summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Provider Inbox + Pressure Engine 2.0 - Uber-like marketplace for auto services. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with minor Quick Mode API integration fix applied.

integration_issues.issue: Quick Mode toggle API call format mismatch - frontend sending object, backend expecting boolean
integration_issues.fix_applied: Updated frontend to send boolean directly instead of wrapped object

passed_tests: Demo provider login creates provider profile with stats
Provider Auth page shows demo login button and features
Provider Inbox shows status bar (Online/Offline, Tier)
Stats row displays: Nearby requests, Accepted, Missed, Lost revenue
Live requests section with request cards
Request cards show: service type, distance, ETA, price
Accept button on request cards working
Reject button on request cards working
Bottom navigation with rating and stats
Provider tier and behavioral score display
